ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "team_size" INTEGER /* Number of team members involved in the project */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the model belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used for the model (e.g., Random Forest, SVM) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the model was last updated */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data used to train the model */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Detailed hyperparameters of the model */,
  "training_time" TEXT /* Time taken to train the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model run */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being run */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Date the model was run */,
  "mtry" INTEGER /* Number of variables tried at each split */,
  "ntree" INTEGER /* Number of trees in the model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "kappa" REAL /* Kappa statistic of the model */,
  "accuracy_sd" REAL /* Standard deviation of the accuracy */,
  "kappa_sd" REAL /* Standard deviation of the Kappa statistic */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the model run */,
  "run_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the model run */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the data used for the run */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the model was run (e.g., production, development) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_runs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, project manager, admin) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Date of the last password change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_projects" (
  "user_project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-project relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user-project relationship */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user-project relationship was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_projects_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_projects_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_model_runs" (
  "user_run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-run interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model run */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date of the action */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the action */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the action */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date the action was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_model_runs_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES model_runs ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_model_runs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changelog for the version, detailing changes and improvements */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "is_production" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the version is in production */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_run_versions" (
  "run_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each run-version relationship */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model run */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the run-version relationship */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the run-version relationship */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the run-version relationship was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_run_versions_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_run_versions_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES model_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance report */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model run the report is for */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., accuracy, detailed, summary) */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report file */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the report */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date the report was approved */,
  "is_final" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the report is final */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reports_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES model_runs ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reports_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
